questions.question: Explain the time complexity of the backtracking algorithm for solving the n-Queens problem using recursion. Compare it with the time complexity of a dynamic programming approach. (10 marks)

Describe the key steps involved in solving the Subset-sum problem using branch-and-bound. Choose the subset that maximises the value while staying within the constraint of the total weight. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Optional hint: Consider using 0/1 Knapsack algorithm

questions.question: Compare the solution of the 0/1 Knapsack problem using branch-and-bound and dynamic programming. Explain the advantages and disadvantages of each approach. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Optional hint: Consider the trade-off between computational complexity and solution accuracy
